_meta.description: Add a single new application to YeshID by clicking 'Add application' on the Applications page and completing the picker modal.

app_name.description: Name of the application to add (e.g. 'Notion', 'Figma'). Typed into the app picker search field.

login_url.description: Login URL for the application (optional). Only used if the modal prompts for it.

verificationStrategy.post: read snackbar, then navigate to /access/applications and confirm app_name appears in the managed applications table

notes: Applications page URL: /access/applications (shows as 'Access Accounts | YeshID').
Two import-related buttons: 'Import application list' (bulk) and 'Add application' (single).
Add application modal has two paths: (1) Search pre-built catalog (2) Type custom app name.
We use the custom path: type into [placeholder='Type application name'], then click 'Add'.
No dropdown needed — avoids click_text polling issues with catalog search.
_meta.title: Add Application

app-search-input.resolvedVia: inference — modal search field not surveyed; pattern from Vuetify dialog
app-search-input._note: fallbackSelectors used because confidence < 0.85; modal contents not surveyed

app-list-item.resolvedVia: inference — modal list items not surveyed

applications-table.resolvedVia: live-survey (access-table data-cy seen on applications page)

chain.note: HOME START: Navigate to overview dashboard before performing action.
Confirm authenticated — username widget must be visible.
Navigate to Applications page (displays as 'Access Accounts').

chain.description: Verify applications page is loaded; confirm 'Add application' button is visible in header
chain.note: Also captures current app list for post-action comparison.
Click 'Add application' to open the app picker modal.

chain.description: Capture the 'Add application' modal — record search field, app list, any data-cy attributes, and available buttons
chain.note: LEARNING STEP: Modal contents not surveyed. Use this to discover search input selector and app list structure.
Type custom app name into 'Type application name' input. cachedSelector=[placeholder='Type application name'] confidence=0.95.
Brief settle after typing app name.
Click 'Add' button in modal to save the custom application. click_text polls buttons for exact text 'Add'.
Capture success or error message from snackbar.
VERIFICATION: Navigate to managed Applications list to confirm {{app_name}} now appears.
Read the applications table. Verify {{app_name}} appears as a row in the managed applications list.
HOME END: Return to overview after action completes.

chain.description: Independent confirmation: verify app_in_applications_table contains app_name indicating successful addition
